_comment: SenyaSalin Landmark Data Schema v0.1. Defines the structure of extracted MediaPipe landmark data stored in data/processed/. Future contributors adding new modalities (pose, face) should extend this schema.
description: Schema for a single landmark recording session (one gesture instance)

field_definitions.label: Gesture class label — must exist in schemas/gestures.json
field_definitions.signer_id: Anonymous signer identifier for dataset tracking
field_definitions.dataset_version: Dataset version this recording belongs to
field_definitions.num_frames: Number of frames captured in this recording
field_definitions.fps: Frames per second of source video
field_definitions.frames[].timestamp_ms: Timestamp of this frame in milliseconds
field_definitions.frames[].*.detected: Whether this hand was detected in this frame
field_definitions.frames[].*.landmarks: 21 MediaPipe hand landmarks, each with normalized x, y, z
field_definitions.frames[].*.landmarks[].z: Depth relative to wrist — smaller = closer to camera
field_definitions.frames[].*.handedness_score: MediaPipe confidence that this is the correct hand
